name: Formstack Forms & Workflow API
what_it_does: Formstack REST API for online forms, document generation, and workflow automation platform. Enables AI agents to query form submissions, retrieve collected data, manage form configurations, trigger document generation, and integrate form data into business workflows. Formstack covers Forms, Documents, and Sign as an integrated no-code platform.
use_cases: Querying form submission data from intake and data collection agents
Retrieving form analytics and conversion data from marketing analytics agents
Triggering document generation from form submissions via business workflow agents
Integrating form data into CRM and business systems from data pipeline agents
not_for: Complex custom form applications (use native web development)
best_when: A business operations team using Formstack wants AI agents to process form submissions, generate documents, and integrate collected data into business systems like CRM and ERP.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Form submissions contain sensitive personal data (medical, legal, HR). GDPR and HIPAA compliance required depending on form content.

auth.notes: Formstack OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. OAuth recommended for user-level integrations. API keys for server integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Forms from $50/mo; platform plans bundling Forms, Documents, Sign
pricing.notes: No-code forms and workflow platform with per-product and bundle pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Form submissions may contain sensitive PII, medical, or legal data — HIPAA/GDPR applies
No public MCP server — OAuth2 or API key REST integration required
Webhook payloads contain full form submission data — validate and handle securely
HIPAA compliance requires Formstack BAA for healthcare form data
Formstack Documents (document generation) has separate API from Forms
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Form submissions can contain PII, medical data, and legal documents. SOC2, HIPAA (with BAA), GDPR. OAuth2 or API key auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Form data including PII, medical, and legal content. SOC2, HIPAA (BAA required), GDPR. OAuth2 and API key auth.
